file_summary: This Python module provides code chunking functionality for repository indexing. It defines a CodeChunk dataclass to represent searchable units and implements functions to chunk repository documents, with special handling for Python files (splitting by functions/classes) and fallback whole-document chunking for other languages or syntax errors.

line_windows.summary: This window covers the entire file. It includes: 1) Module docstring describing purpose; 2) Imports (annotations, dataclasses, ast, typing); 3) CodeChunk dataclass definition with chunk metadata fields; 4) Main chunk_documents function that orchestrates chunking across documents; 5) Helper _chunk_python_document that uses AST to extract functions/classes; 6) Helper _chunk_whole_document for fallback whole-file chunking. The window shows the complete chunking pipeline from document input to chunk list output.
